mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, task_title AS taskTitle FROM task WHERE project_id = #{pId}
SELECT common_id,default_describe FROM common_code WHERE common_code = '0D'
SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.email AS email, u.user_name AS userName FROM members m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code WHERE m.project_id = #{pId}
SELECT task_priority_id AS priorityId, priority_name AS priorityName FROM task_priority WHERE company_id = #{cId} AND using_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TST-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_' || (SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_id, 12))), 0) + 1 FROM test_case WHERE test_id LIKE 'TST-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_%') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO test_case ( test_id, task_id, milestone_version, project_id, user_code, test_name, created_at, test_date, priority, test_yn, test_manager, test_content, test_describe, coverage_status ) VALUES ( #{testId}, #{taskId}, ( SELECT m_parent.milestone_title FROM task t JOIN milestone m_child ON t.milestone_id = m_child.milestone_id JOIN milestone m_parent ON m_child.parent_milestone_id = m_parent.milestone_id WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} ), #{projectId}, #{userCode}, #{testName}, SYSDATE, #{testDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{priority}, #{testYn}, #{testManager, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testDescribe, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{coverageStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_case tc WHERE tc.project_id = #{pId}
AND tc.test_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
